dialog: Nice to meet you, you must be Lady Rate. Doc Epoch says there is a right speed for my learning.
Exactly! I control the Learning Rate! If you run too fast, you trip and your line will shake wildly. If you go too slow, it will take centuries.
Uhm, I understand... in theory. How do we test it in practice?
Enough talking! Open the Simulator below. Use the 'Learning Rate' slider: if the value is too high, chaos will rain. Lower it towards 0.05 and raise the Epochs. Click Start and reach 85%!
